wikitext:
[]: I need a sypnosis of episode 26.             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sun Aug 06, 2006 7:29 am Youtube's being a bitch right now so I need a sypnosis of 26. The main site here gives me a 404 when I try to see it.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Aug 06, 2006 7:59 am Shinji deals with his issues, sees an alternate reality where everyone are typical characters from an Ecchi Comedy, understands he doesn't have to hate himself, and everyone tell him 'Congratulations!'.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Sun Aug 06, 2006 8:06 am Like, I need a link w/ all the dialouge and stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 06, 2006 8:47 am You should be playing your own copies of the DVD (hint, hint) but if it's just scripts you want, try the links here: http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?p=42414#42414
